status_note: AWQ-4bit single-stream reference. MTP K=7 speculative decoding. Every other variant is measured against this configuration.

architecture.quantization: compressed-tensors W4A16, group_size=32, symmetric, AWQ-calibrated on MLP Linear layers; lm_head and embeddings kept in FP16
architecture.speculative_decoding: MTP (multi-token-predictor) head, K=7 candidates per step

local_measurements.summary: Speculative depth sweep selects K=4 as the latency optimum (+8.6% over the K=7 default on the short+medium mix).

notes: Hybrid attention layers sit at indices 3,7,11,15,19,23,27,31. Cold-start is cut from ~697s to ~156s by pre-baking the torch.compile cache and matching the inductor cache key across build/serve GPUs (scripts/_cache_patch.py, scripts/bake_cache.py).
